candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
Figure below indicates a modular structure of the homodimer. Three positions are indicated on the model. Position A is the active site. Position B is a region known to have a large number of nonpolar residues. Position C is known to have a large number of charged residues. 
A mutation is discovered in the gene for ARKKKK60491 that converts positively charged lysine residue into negatively charged glutamic acid residue. This single change directly impacts the location where the substrate to ARKKKK60491 attaches during catalysis. Which position is likely affected by this change? 
I. Position A

II. Position B

III. Position C
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
蛋白 Arkkkkk60491 介导了产生狗唾液所必需的反应的酶促催化。Arkkkkk60491 是一种同型二聚体,每个亚基由 337 个氨基酸组成。下图表示同型二聚体的模块化结构,其中标注了三个位置:位置 A 是主动位点,位置 B 是已知具有大量疏水残基的区域,位置 C 具有大量带电残基。

在 Arkkkkk60491 的基因中发现了一个突变,该突变将带正电荷的赖氨酸残基转换为带负电荷的谷氨酸残基。这种单个变化直接影响催化过程中底物结合的位置。这种变化可能会影响哪个位置?

I. 位置 A
II. 位置 B
III. 位置 C

(答案是一个字母。)
metadata.explanation_zh: 该题目陈述变化影响底物结合的区域,即活性位点。A位点被确定为活性位点。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The question text fully specifies the roles of positions A, B, and C, and states that the mutation affects the substrate-attachment site during catalysis, which directly identifies the active site (Position A). The image is only supplementary.
